texto: Unhappiness. There are all kinds of unhappy people in the world. I suppose it would be no exaggeration to say that the world is composed entirely of unhappy people. My unhappiness stemmed entirely from my own vices, and I had no way of fighting anybody.

texto: When I pretended to be precocious, people started the rumor that I was precocious. When I acted like an idler, rumor had it I was an idler. When I pretended I couldn't write a novel, people said I couldn't write. When I acted like a liar, they called me a liar. When I acted like a rich man, they started the rumor I was rich. When I feigned indifference, they classed me as the indifferent type. But when I inadvertently groaned because I was really in pain, they started the rumor that I was faking suffering. The world is out of joint.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Osamu Dazai: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “When I pretended to be precocious, people started the rumor that I was precocious. When I acted l…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, family, friends pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e friends.

texto: Humanity? Don't be silly. I know. It is knocking down your fellow-men for the sake of your own happiness.
